summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Fidelis Logic Blog Admin Panel. All backend APIs (15/15 tests passed) and frontend flows working correctly. Admin login, blog CRUD, and contact form all functional.
action_items: Add data-testid attributes to BlogEditor.jsx and AdminDashboard.jsx for better testability (minor enhancement)
critical_code_review_comments: Missing data-testid attributes on most interactive elements - added to AdminLogin.jsx, should be added to other pages
Contact form validation works correctly - requires Topic of Interest selection
seed_data_creation: Test blog posts created and cleaned up during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features tested and working: Admin login at /admin/login, Blog dashboard at /admin/blog, Blog editor at /admin/blog/new, Public blog at /blog, Contact form at /contact. JWT authentication working. MongoDB storing blog posts and contacts correctly.

admin_login.details: Login with admin/changeme works, redirects to /admin/blog, JWT token stored in localStorage

admin_dashboard.details: Shows list of blog posts with stats (Total, Published, Drafts), search functionality, edit/delete buttons

blog_editor.details: Create new post with title, content, category, excerpt, publish toggle all working. Post saved to MongoDB and appears on public blog

public_blog.details: Fetches posts from API, displays with category filters, shows post cards with images

contact_form.details: Form submission saves to database, shows success toast message
